channel.title: Quantum-Chips on Dyson Sphere Program Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Quantum-Chips on Dyson Sphere Program Guide

item.title: DSP Green Science Deep Dive (v0.10) - Casimir Crystals, Quantum Chips and Full Production Chain
item.description:
Short answer: Green Science (Gravity Matrix) needs Casimir Crystals, Quantum Chips, and Graviton Lenses. The Casimir Crystal chain is the hardest - it consumes massive Hydrogen and Graphene. Build dedicated Hydrogen processing before scaling green science, or hydrogen backup will halt your entire factory.

Gravity Matrix is the fifth science tier. It unlocks Warpers (interstellar travel), Plane Smelters, Artificial Stars, and the endgame research tree. Green science is where factory design separates casual players from experts - the chain complexity rivals everything before it combined.

item.title: DSP Quantum Chips & Proliferator: Advanced Production Guide
item.description:
Every factory has a ceiling. At some point you're running 40 assemblers on your Circuit Board chain and wondering if there's a better way. In DSP v0.10, there is: Proliferator.

It's a resource you produce, spray onto your production lines, and watch your output climb without adding a single new assembler.

This guide covers the Quantum Chip production chain and explains the Proliferator system — what it is, how to produce it, what it does, and how to use it without turning your factory into a confusing mess of spray towers.
